title: cleome spinosa f. horrida
intro: Cleome spinosa f. horrida, also known as Spiny Bee Plant, is a tropical plant species belonging to the Cleomaceae family, characterized by its distinctive spiny stem and vibrant purple flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cleome spinosa f. horrida include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, wounds, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant's leaves and flowers can be used to prepare herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and salves, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
